[2026-06-08 13:54] Claude - DONE: Built + tuned a STEM-BASED section detector (Source/stem_detector.py), the new direction toward fully-autonomous detection (Sam's 'jigsaw' vision). Spike (committed ca58fd4) proved Demucs stems beat the 3-band amplitude detector. Detector reads Demucs stems (ANALYSIS-ONLY: in-memory, soundfile I/O no torchaudio/ffmpeg, original WAV untouched; envelopes cached) into labelled sections + mix signals. Calibrated by eye with Sam across ALL 10 tracks of 08.06.26 Mix. RULES: kick IN/OUT via DYNAMIC threshold = 0.80 of the track's solid (full-drop) kick level found by 2-means (not a fixed percentile); kick out->in = new 16-beat section; sections snap to 16-beat (4-bar) phrase grid; intro before first drop; drop = top-tier energy (DROP_REL 0.85) that sustains; break = kick OR bass out > 6 bars; fill = kick-out <= 6 bars flanked by drops (edge fills fold into adjacent break); pre-drop long kick-out = 'first break' (James Poole); outro = END OF LAST FILL (rule of thumb) when at/after or within ~a phrase of the lead(vocals+other)-drop, else the lead-drop (VLAD); every track guaranteed intro+outro; drops stay split at fills, breaks/intro/outro merge. SIGNALS: kick_cues, fills, bass_regions (bass-to-bass), loop_windows (drums-on/bass-off), vocal_regions (clash avoidance), ~1min in/out major cues. DETECT_*.png viz: track+4 stems, coloured/labelled sections w/ bar counts, fills, kick cues, mm:ss+bar grid. Commits: ca58fd4 c86240a 25625f8 37eb2e4 f7d524c 6d5fe97. NEXT: wire detector into pipeline as the section source (replace/augment phrase_viz), GPU torch build for Demucs, RB-phrase ENSEMBLE (agreement->confidence->only-review-disagreements). Essentia flagged as future path to also own key(MIK)+beats(RB). 08.06.26 test mix still PAUSED at Sections V1.

[2026-06-11 13:52] Claude (Opus 4.8) - DONE: Warp/beatgrid regression DIAGNOSED (no code changed - investigation only).
